---
title: "plotly"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

# Here are some plots
 today wer're taking interactive plots in plotly. we'll make examooles using ht eNYC airbnb dataset
 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(p8105.datasets)

library(plotly)
```
 
 
 do some initial data cleaning/subsetting
